seo.title: Section Showcase
seo.description: One page that exercises each supported section renderer for the technical-product-showcase demo site — smart equipment stories, modular systems, analytics, FAQs, stats, imagery, certificates, capture forms, plus contact shortcuts.

sections.title: All supported section primitives on a single scrolling surface.
sections.description: This page intentionally uses tight copy blocks so testers can visually compare spacing, overlays, typography, and breakpoints without paging around the site.
sections.imageAlt: Control room vantage point over production tooling

items.title: Smart equipment
items.description: Sensorised tooling, networked PLCs, and maintenance pathways that shorten mean time to recovery.

items.title: Industrial technology
items.description: Automation cells, deterministic IO, deterministic motion choreography, repeatable documentation.

items.title: Modular product systems
items.description: Hardware families engineered for configuration instead of perpetual one-off rework.

sections.title: What integration teams scrutinise first
sections.description: Checklist distilled from hardened B2B product showcase exercises — use it as QA copy wiring for the renderer.

items.title: Environmental stress envelope
items.description: Does the SKU survive derated extremes without silent component drift?

items.title: Operational observability
items.description: Can maintenance teams reason about anomalies without escalating to vendor war rooms?

items.title: Supply continuity
items.description: Do multi-year BOM lifecycles exist with explicit second-source strategies?

items.title: Cyber resilience
items.description: Minimal attack surfaces, audited roles, cryptographic hygiene, safe remote access.

sections.title: Modular bays that scale cleanly
sections.description: Modular hardware ships as stacked bays with repeatable cable harnesses — deploy two today, replicate twenty without rewriting documentation families.
sections.imageAlt: Engineers iterating on prototypes at a workstation

items.label: Factory acceptance scripting
items.description: Demonstration metric for scripted acceptance rehearsals before outbound shipment.

items.label: Modular SKU families under engineering control
items.description: Each family shares mechanical interfaces despite divergent payloads.

items.label: Energy topology patterns
items.description: From behind-the-meter storage to inverter stacking for redundancy.

items.label: Automation integration pathways
items.description: OPC UA, EtherCAT, deterministic IO bridging, deterministic motion slices.

items.title: Industrial technology retrofit
items.description: Replaced jittery analogue loops without expanding panel footprint materially.

items.title: Energy storage uplift
items.description: Load shifting plus resilience with transparent telemetry for finance teams auditing savings.

items.title: Foundry instrumentation upgrade
items.description: Closed-loop observation on critical assets without disrupting batch chemistry windows.

steps.title: Frame the scene
steps.description: What must stay deterministic, observable, repeatable?

steps.title: Observe in situ
steps.description: Capture telemetry, anomaly shapes, escalation paths.

items.title: Operational excellence signal
items.description: Drop authentic certificate artwork paths under `/assets/certificates/` when available — until then textual placeholders keep validators happy.

items.title: Energy compliance placeholder
items.description: Reference path reserved for interconnect authorities once artwork exists.

items.question: Why keep every section visible on one page?
items.answer: It accelerates QA: spacing, breakpoints, accordion behaviour, and stacked density can be exercised without navigation hopping.

items.question: When should imagery be suppressed?
items.answer: When assets are unfinished — textual sections still satisfy schema while designers iterate on imagery.

items.question: What about energy sceptics?
items.answer: Pair quantitative stats with explanatory copy so sceptics recognise conservatism in claims.

sections.title: Escalations without drowning in chatter
sections.description: Use short contact channels alongside the lead form for buyers who dislike web forms.
